title: Fix Customer Soft Delete Reappearance
why: The GET /customers API was fetching all customers, including soft-deleted ones (isActive: false), because it lacked a default active filter. This caused deleted customers to reappear on the UI upon F5 refresh.
root_cause: Missing default isActive filter for soft-deleted records in Prisma findMany.
solution: Added a default 'where.isActive = true' filter to getCustomers when the 'active' parameter is undefined.
prevention: When implementing Soft Deletes, always ensure GET APIs filter by the active flag by default.
